steps.t: Varthmath can be found at Zidir-nesad, The Steepset, in Máttugard. You should talk to Varthmath at Zidir-nesad.
Ronglagam can be found south-east of Zidir-nesad in Máttugard. You should travel to Ronglagam.
Ronglagam can be found south-east of Zidir-nesad in Máttugard. You should defeat stone-claws and collect samples at Ronglagam.
Varthmath can be found near Ronglagam in Máttugard. You should bring the samples to Varthmath.
